calculation_notes: Baselines are hand-derived from ALGORITHMS.md; no generated tooling was used.
This fixture has no server entries and no connections; it exists to prove recursive BOM works on a non-server DeviceClass (a switch with transceiver sub-components).
Device count = switch instances only = override_quantity(2) = 2. per_fabric_switch_counts.bom-fabric.server-leaf = 2.
Cable count = 0: no connections, no spine entries, so no cables are derived. Wiring is intentionally out of scope for this BOM-focused fixture.

BOM (Algorithm 6, recursive DeviceClass traversal on a non-server root): leaf-switch-800g per unit = the switch itself x1 plus osfp-800g-xcvr x64 (one transceiver sub-component slot at quantity_per_parent 64). Fleet = per_unit x plan_quantity(2): osfp-800g-xcvr 64 x 2 = 128.

bom-fabric.note: N/A (DECISIONS.md D17): the leaf class declares no UPLINK zone and there is no spine tier, so leaf-uplink bandwidth is 0. Reported as 0.0 = N/A.
